title: Hicorius amara
uses: Hicorius amara, also known as black horehound, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. It has been employed to treat coughs, respiratory issues, and other conditions related to the chest and lungs. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to make teas and infusions for their perceived medicinal benefits. In addition, black horehound has been used to treat digestive issues and to reduce fever. However, more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
